title: NAD+ and NMN: Complete Guide for Women Over 40
tags: NAD+, NMN, longevity, women over 40, cellular energy
author: Happy Aging Team
summary_html: NAD+ declines significantly after 40, reducing cellular energy and repair. NMN supplementation raises NAD+ levels and is the best-studied approach for women over 40 — this hub covers what NAD+ is, how NMN works, timing, sirtuins, and autophagy.
seo_title: NAD+ and NMN for Women Over 40: Complete Guide (2026)
seo_description: NAD+ declines after 40, but NMN can help. This complete guide covers what NAD+ is, how NMN works, the best timing, sirtuins, and autophagy — all in plain language.
